title: Unnai Naan Santhithen Lyrics Aayirathil Oruvan(1965)
stanzas: <div>Unnai Naan Santhithen Lyrics From Aayirathil Oruvan(1965)

Unnaithaan mudhal enbaen

manam enbae

Unnai naan Santhithen
nee aayirathil oruvan
ennai naan koduthaen
en aazhayathin iraivan
aazhayathin iraivan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unnai Naan Santhithen'?

The song expresses deep love and longing, conveying the emotions of a lover who has found their soulmate.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Aayirathil Oruvan, the song reflects the romantic journey of the protagonists, highlighting their emotional connection.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary P. Susheela, known for her soulful voice in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Unnai Naan Santhithen' was composed by the famous duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 1965, making it a cherished classic in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Unnai Naan Santhithen', the protagonist expresses profound love and devotion, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a simpler time of love. Featured in the classic film Aayirathil Oruvan, it beautifully complements the emotional narrative of the characters. This timeless piece continues to resonate with audiences, celebrating the essence of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnai Naan Santhithen from Aayirathil Oruvan is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With P. Susheela's enchanting vocals and the melodious composition by Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the nostalgia and romance that this iconic track brings to life.
stanzaMeanings: I have met you, you are the one in a thousand.
I have given you my heart's lord.
I have met you, you are the one in a thousand.
You are the first I call, like a small child I feel.
With my eyes, I have embraced you, with my hands, I have blossomed.
From the heart, I am the leader of all emotions.
I have met you, you are the one in a thousand.
With my heart, I have followed you, like a million stars shining in my heart.
I have come without saying anything, and I have forgotten it because of my own self.
Oh dear, if I wear you as a garland, I will be happy.
I have met you, you are the one in a thousand, I have given you my heart's lord, my heart's lord.
I have met you, you are the one in a thousand.
